Tournament Star Sword

When attacking, has a [20%-22%] chance of restoring [9%-11%] health in self.
Once in a while, the unit turns 3 farthest enemies to stone for 3 sec. During this time, they cannot move and take 35% more damage. Also, the targets and all enemies in a small radius around them take 200000 physical damage every second for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
